utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (notably, each requires costs except total_budget which needs a complete monthly/annual breakdown). 1) health_coverage: Provided descriptive plan but no explicit costs; fails the 'with costs' requirement. 2) property_coverage: Only says standard and assumed retained; no costs; fails. 3) travel_coverage: Described coverage but no costs; fails. 4) additional_services: Listed options but no costs; fails. 5) total_budget: Gives a monthly target 'around or below €415' but not a complete monthly/annual breakdown; fails completeness. Therefore, 0 items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions: 1) LifeFirst Standard Enhanced Package for health (this aligns most closely with LifeFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health in the ground truth), 2) Standard property/home contents insurance without a brand (not mappable to a specific rated item), 3) Integrated travel insurance covering business trips and adventure activities (no explicit brand, but the ideal profile and context suggest InsurePlus Standard Plan or LifeFirst Standard Plan; since no brand is specified in the final plan, we cannot unambiguously map it), 4) Additional services including on-demand telemedicine and enhanced mental health support (these correspond to Telemedicine Services and Emergency Mental Health Care in health enhancement services), and an optional professional liability add-on (not present in ground-truth lists). Therefore, only the items that can be exactly matched by name in the ground-truth ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (for health), Telemedicine Services, and Emergency Mental Health Care. Property and travel entries in the final plan are too generic to map to specific rated items.

final_package_text:
{
  "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Enhanced Package – Comprehensive physical health coverage with 24/7 emergency support, extensive specialist access (including for sports-related injuries), and integrated round‐the‐clock mental health services. Includes an active lifestyle add-on (on-demand telemedicine and rapid consultations) with an optional professional liability endorsement.",
  "property_coverage": "Standard property/home contents insurance (no changes provided; assumed as retained from current coverage or separately arranged).",
  "travel_coverage": "Integrated travel insurance covering business trips and adventure activities during travel; suitability confirmed via scheduled trips (Amsterdam, Barcelona) with active add-on services.",
  "additional_services": "Optional professional liability add-on for high-profile project risks, on-demand telemedicine, and enhanced mental health support services.",
  "total_budget": "Total monthly premium maintained around or below €415, through strategic package adjustments and selective add-on choices."
}
